detectors.description:

	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow

	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2

	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:

detectors.description: Variable OpenAddressLottery.LuckyNumber (OpenAddressLottery.sol#59) is not in mixedCase

Reentrancy in OpenAddressLottery.participate() (OpenAddressLottery.sol#77-109):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(win) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#99)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp)) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#107)
		- lastReseed = block.number (OpenAddressLottery.sol#137)
	- reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp)) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#107)
		- secretSeed = uint256(keccak256()(components.component1,components.component2,components.component3,components.component4)) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#125-135)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [OpenAddressLottery.participate()](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L77-L109):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(win)](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L99)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp))](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L107)
		- [lastReseed = block.number](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L137)
	- [reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp))](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L107)
		- [secretSeed = uint256(keccak256()(components.component1,components.component2,components.component3,components.component4))](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L125-L135)
